full_text:
Zhang Qiao 張喬
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Qiao (張喬). Jin general who dealt a heavy defeat to Wu’s troops under Zhang Ti. Zhang Qiao was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
